channel.title: Writing - Ashwin Gopalsamy
channel.description: Staff Software Engineer scaling authorization infrastructure at Pismo, Visa.

item.title: Now
item.description:
Work

Building authorization infrastructure at Pismo (Visa). Currently focused on multi-region deployment patterns and cross-network routing optimization.

Learning

Deep-diving into consistent hashing implementations and their failure modes under partition. Reading “Designing Data-Intensive Applications - Second Edition” (Pre-Release)things hit different now with more production experience.

Side Projects

Building this website. Experimenting with Hugo’s template system and seeing how far you can push a static site with zero JavaScript frameworks.
item.content:encoded:
Work

Building authorization infrastructure at Pismo (Visa). Currently focused on multi-region deployment patterns and cross-network routing optimization.

Learning

Deep-diving into consistent hashing implementations and their failure modes under partition. Reading “Designing Data-Intensive Applications - Second Edition” (Pre-Release)things hit different now with more production experience.

Side Projects

Building this website. Experimenting with Hugo’s template system and seeing how far you can push a static site with zero JavaScript frameworks.
item.author: ashwin@ashwingopalsamy.in (Ashwin Gopalsamy)

item.title: About
item.description:
Staff Software Engineer focused on cloud-native platforms, distributed systems, and software product development.

Currently scaling authorization infrastructure at Pismo, Visa with systems that process billions of daily transactions with sub-second latency across multiple regions.

Previously built core-banking microservices at Solaris SE in Berlin, powering interest-bearing financial products at scale.

Open-source contributor and technical blogger writing about Go, distributed systems, and cloud-native architecture.
item.content:encoded:
Staff Software Engineer focused on cloud-native platforms, distributed systems, and software product development.

Currently scaling authorization infrastructure at Pismo, Visa with systems that process billions of daily transactions with sub-second latency across multiple regions.

Previously built core-banking microservices at Solaris SE in Berlin, powering interest-bearing financial products at scale.

Open-source contributor and technical blogger writing about Go, distributed systems, and cloud-native architecture.
item.author: ashwin@ashwingopalsamy.in (Ashwin Gopalsamy)

item.title: AI Context
item.description: Staff Software Engineer at Visa’s Pismo unit. Building modern, distributed payment infrastructure. Half a decade shipping fintech products from scratch - core banking engines, interest calculation, tax processing, and most recently, scaling authorization infrastructure. Cloud-native, event-driven, sub-second or it does not ship.
item.content:encoded: Staff Software Engineer at Visa’s Pismo unit. Building modern, distributed payment infrastructure. Half a decade shipping fintech products from scratch - core banking engines, interest calculation, tax processing, and most recently, scaling authorization infrastructure. Cloud-native, event-driven, sub-second or it does not ship.
item.author: ashwin@ashwingopalsamy.in (Ashwin Gopalsamy)
